data.body: Placeholder: Promptfoo-based skills eval framework with two layers — quality evals (llm-rubric assertions on skill output) and trigger evals (eval-set.json with routing assertions). Requires spike to validate promptfoo integration path (should_trigger is not a native promptfoo feature; skill-used assertion has known issues per anthropics/claude-code#36570). Split from 83fc-81fb during brainstorm.
